message.content:
### 1) Hero Section (Main Banner)  
The hero section is a **full-width, split-color banner** with a bold red-and-white color scheme, designed to highlight a payment promotion. It occupies the top portion of the page below the navigation bar and spans the entire width of the viewport.  

- **Layout Structure**: The banner is divided diagonally (via a curved white shape on the left and solid red on the right), creating a dynamic, modern split. The left side (white) contains text and a large numeral, while the right side (red) features a payment method logo.  
- **Text Content**:  
  - Left side: Large, bold red text reads *"HASTA 6 CUOTAS sin interés"* (Up to 6 interest-free installments). The numeral "6" is oversized (approximately 3–4x the size of the accompanying text) and positioned to the left of the phrase, drawing immediate attention.  
  - Right side: A white oval logo with red text says *"MODO"*, followed by smaller text: *"BANCOS SELECCIONADOS"* (Selected Banks) and logos of partner banks: *ICBC, Supervielle, YPF, Banco Comafi* (each in their respective brand colors: blue, green, yellow, and green).  
- **Visual Elements**: The split design uses high-contrast colors (red/white) for maximum visibility. The "6" is stylized with a thick, rounded font, and the "MODO" logo has a clean, modern sans-serif typeface. No images of products are present—focus is purely on the promotional message.  


### 2) Promotional Info Bars (Shipping, Payments, etc.)  
There are **no visible promotional info bars** (e.g., shipping, payment, or trust badges) in the provided screenshot. The hero section itself acts as the primary promotional element, with the "MODO" payment logo serving as the only payment-related visual.  


### 3) Content Below the Hero  
Immediately below the hero section, a **horizontal navigation bar** spans the full width of the page. It sits on a light gray background and contains five menu items in black, sans-serif text:  
- *"Productos"* (Products)  
- *"Notebooks"* (Notebooks)  
- *"Armá tu PC"* (Build Your PC)  
- *"Outlet"* (Outlet)  
- *"Ayuda"* (Help)  

This navigation bar is a standard e-commerce menu, with even spacing between items and no submenus or dropdowns visible in the screenshot.  


### 4) Overall Design Style and Color Scheme  
- **Design Style**: The design is **minimalist and functional**, prioritizing clarity and promotional messaging. It uses high-contrast colors, bold typography, and clean lines to guide user attention. The aesthetic is modern and tech-focused, with a focus on readability and direct communication (common in e-commerce for driving conversions).  
- **Color Scheme**:  
  - **Primary Colors**: Red (#E60000 or similar) and white (#FFFFFF) dominate the hero section, creating a striking, attention-grabbing contrast.  
  - **Secondary Colors**: Black (#000000) is used for the header (logo, search bar, navigation, and user icons) and text, providing a neutral base that makes red elements pop.  
  - **Accent Colors**: Light gray (#F0F0F0 or similar) is used for the navigation bar background, separating it from the hero and header.  
- **Visual Elements**:  
  - **Header**: A black bar at the top contains the logo (*"COMPRA GAMER"* in white, with an orange 3D cube icon), a search bar ("Buscar productos" in gray placeholder text, white background, black border), and user icons ("Ingresá" in white text with an orange user icon, and a red shopping cart icon).  
  - **Typography**: Sans-serif fonts are used throughout (e.g., the logo, navigation, and hero text), contributing to a modern, tech-savvy feel. The hero text uses a bold, rounded font for emphasis, while the navigation uses a lighter, more understated sans-serif.  
  - **Icons**: Simple, flat icons (user, cart, search) in orange/red complement the color scheme and maintain consistency.  


### Summary  
The homepage is designed to immediately communicate a key promotion (interest-free installments) using a bold, high-contrast hero section. The layout is clean and functional, with a focus on navigation and user actions (search, login, cart). The color scheme (red, black, white) is consistent with tech/e-commerce branding, emphasizing urgency and clarity. No additional promotional bars are visible, keeping the focus on the hero message and primary navigation.
